etymology.description: зіё(зіё) (sД«, "silk; thread") + иЁЂ(иЁЂ) (yГЎn, "speech") = threads of speech -> various, miscellaneous
etymology.interpretation: The combination of зіё(зіё) (sД«, "silk; thread") with иЁЂ(иЁЂ) (yГЎn, "speech") suggests speech that is woven together in various threads, representing a collection of different and miscellaneous topics or narratives.
